Overrides.Override: Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
6% reduced Effect of Curses on you
20% chance for Skills to not consume a Cooldown on use Limited to 1 Runegraft of Time
6% reduced Effect of Curses on you
